meaning: n.成就法(印度教与佛教密宗用语,指人召请本尊,与其融为一体,并将其并入自身之法)
examples: It may happen that you miss a day during a sadhana.
Your sadhana may be blissful one day and very challenging the next.
Therefore we need help. So this is why Sadhana always begin with the refuge.
But Sadhana Srivastava, in an article in India's Economic and Political Weekly, has recalculated both India's and China's figures for the year 2000 to make a fairer comparison.
